stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Chart 10-3Q from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
What is the difference between EHØ48 and EHØ8Ø?

options.a: EHØ8Ø is a fly-over waypoint for B737 only. Other aircraft use EHØ48 instead, which is a fly-by waypoint.
options.b: EHØ8Ø is a fly-by waypoint for all aircraft.
options.c: EHØ8Ø and EHØ48 are both used by B737, other aircraft only use EHØ48.
options.d: EHØ8Ø is a fly-by waypoint for B737. Other aircraft use EHØ48 instead, which is a fly-over waypoint.
